## Summary

Describe what this pull request changes and why.

## Change Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Test improvement
- [ ] Build/CI change

## Governance Checklist

- [ ] I preserved original-media immutability.
- [ ] I did not bypass verification invariants.
- [ ] I added or updated tests for behavior changes.
- [ ] I added a migration for schema changes.
- [ ] I updated docs/ADRs if architecture or policy changed.

## Validation

- [ ] Unit tests pass
- [ ] Integration tests pass
- [ ] Relevant real-world import path considered

Commands or evidence used:

## Risk Assessment

Describe integrity, provenance, and operational risks.

## Related Issues

Link related issues (for example: Closes #123).

## Screenshots or Logs (if applicable)

Attach logs, report snippets, or screenshots if useful.
